curation.synopsis: The world of Bastion has chosen neutrality in the civil war, and both sides have sent ambassadors to win it. The Imperium's are two loyalist Space Marines — Heka'tan of the Salamanders and Arcadese of the Ultramarines — accompanied by the remembrancer Persephia. When their landing ship is shot down they reach the capital on foot, surrender their weapons, and stand to argue their case against Horus's smooth-tongued envoy Vorkellen. Beneath the city an Iron Warrior is rigging the planet's foundations with atomics. Persephia stumbles upon the saboteur and is killed; a lacrymole shape-shifter is sent to assassinate Vorkellen in open court. As Bastion begins to come apart, Heka'tan and Arcadese must decide whose lives are worth saving — including that of the enemy whose mission would have destroyed their own.
